plan.failureSummary: The test failed during deterministic cached execution because a click action failed on the element '[role=\"combobox\"]' with text 'Select your occupation'. Visual comparison with the failure screenshot reveals that the 'Tell us about yourself' form has changed significantly and no longer contains an occupation dropdown/combobox at this step; instead, it has 'Age Group' radio buttons. This form redesign rendered the cached element selector invalid.

remediationSteps.summary: Delete page.ai cache and retry automation
remediationSteps.details: Clear the Page AI execution cache for this test and retry. The autonomous web test agent will re-analyze the updated form structure and adapt the filling actions accordingly.

plan.notes: The overallObjective 'Fill out the all of the survey questions...' is semantically flexible. Clearing the Page AI cache and allowing the autonomous agent to re-evaluate the updated form fields (filling out the new 'Age Group' radios rather than attempting to click the missing 'Select your occupation' combobox) is highly likely to succeed.
